comments.title: Comments
comments.routeSubtitle: Discussion for this task. This panel mounts in the Task Detail right rail.
comments.emptySub: Start the discussion for this task.

detail.noDocuments: No documents in this task yet.
detail.noPriorReviews: No prior revisions on this task.
detail.readOnlyClaimed: This step is assigned to {{holder}} — you can view and comment, but not submit.
detail.readOnlyNotAssigned: You're not the assignee for this step — you can view and comment, but not submit.
detail.noOpenStepBody: There's no step waiting on you for this task right now.
detail.actionIntro: Review the task and submit your decision. Your decision routes the task forward.
detail.commentPlaceholder: Add a note for the next reviewer…
detail.attachmentError: Couldn't upload that file. Please try again.
detail.submitError: Couldn't submit your decision. Please try again.
detail.submitErrorEngine: This step calls a subflow the engine cannot run yet — contact your workflow admin.
detail.submittedBody: Your decision has been recorded and the task has advanced.
detail.documentsNoAccess: You don't have access to this task's documents.
detail.documentsLineageTitle: Copied from the project's documents when this task was created.

createTask.title: New task
createTask.subtitle: Pick a workflow, set the details, and assign it.

step1.emptyHint: Publish one from Settings → Workflows to create tasks from it.
step1.noStartRunTitle: You don't have permission to start workflow runs
step1.noStartRunHint: Ask a workspace admin to grant you the Start Run permission.
step1.noPermissionTitle: You don't have permission to create tasks
step1.noPermissionHint: Ask a workspace admin to grant you the Create Task permission.

step2.notesPlaceholder: Extra context passed along with the workflow (optional)
step2.handOffEmpty: This project has no documents to hand off yet.

step3.hint: Assignment is optional and resolved against your org chart and policy rules.

errors.workflowNotPublished: That workflow is no longer published — publish it before creating a task.
errors.workflowNotFound: That workflow could not be found.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to assign this task that way.
errors.generic: Couldn't create the task. Please try again.

assign.title: Assign task
assign.subtitle: Set who is responsible for this task and who reviews it.
assign.noResults: No matching people, roles or groups.
assign.auditNote: This change is recorded in the audit log.
assign.error: Couldn't update the assignment. Please try again.
assign.forbidden: You don't have permission to assign this task.

reassign.title: Reassign step
reassign.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Original assignee is out of office until next week.
reassign.noCandidates: No other active users are available to take this step.
reassign.noStep: There's no step waiting on this task to reassign.
reassign.auditNote: This action is recorded in the audit log.
reassign.error: Couldn't reassign the step. Please try again.
